ascii_lines = after.ascii.split('\n')
for r in range(38, 47):

        ch = ascii_lines[r][c]
        if ch == 'c': row_str += '.'
        elif ch == 'G': row_str += '#'
        elif ch == 'O': row_str += 'o'
        elif ch == 'b': row_str += 'b'
        elif ch == 'B': row_str += 'B'
        elif ch == 'W': row_str += '+'
        elif ch == 'w': row_str += ','
        else: row_str += ch
    print(f"{r:2d}: {row_str}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
